title: SP Checklist
heading: Survey Programming (SP) QA Checklist
description: Select an exercise type below to view its specific QA rules.

categories.title: Basics & Logic
items: Sections: Verify all sections are present (Screener, Main, Demographics, etc.).
Terminations: Check if all screener terminations work properly.
Qualifications: Check that any DVs holding qualifications punch correctly.
QC Flag: Ensure all QC flags are properly placed and functioning.
Logic: Check all skip/filter logic at the question or section level.
Quotas: Verify all quotas are built, punching correctly, and check Most Need/Least Filled.
Assigners: Check that the assigner is working based on Web Author specifications (or whatever document is the source of truth).
Look and Feel: Graphics look good, no HTML visible, grids/tables correct.

categories.title: Closed & Open Ended
items: Closed-Ended: Check single vs. multi-punch and randomization/default of response lists.
Closed-Ended: Verify 'other' stubs are anchored with a text-entry pop-up.
Closed-Ended: If there is stub-level logic, check that logic is working correctly and stub groupings are correct.
Closed-Ended: Any 'other' stubs are anchored and have a text-entry pop-up when selected
Closed-Ended: Type in response to 'other' pop-ups to make sure it's piped through correctly later in the survey (if that's what logic says should happen)
CLosed-Ended: Check that all inserts and custom validations are working correctly.
Open-Ended: Check 'other specify' usage, numerical ranges, and error messages for character limits.
Open-Ended: Check that sums of parts or shares between two questions add up correctly.

categories.title: Special Exercises
items: IIM:Check if images are not broken or inside a circle.
DCM / Coinjoint: Ensure the respondent stubs are mapped to the correct concepts.
DCM / Coinjoint: Check that the correct number of stubs are being displayed in each concept.
Typing Tool: Check that the typing tool is working correctly against the logic provided in excel.
Polars: Check that the bipolar scale is displayed correctly.
Polars: Check if scales are randomized or default (column should be default, rows can be both).
Highlighter: Check that the highlighter is working correctly and that the correct highlighter is being used for the exercise type.
MaxDiff: Check that the max diff is working correctly, including the follow up questions.
MaxDiff: Check if all the flags are punching correctly.

categories.title: Media & Translation
items: Media: Correct clips/images showing up, verify quality, ensure audio can be heard.
Translations: No English in question text, instructions, stubs, or errors. Verify no formatting is broken.
